ValidationRule.description: Ensures each template item has the assignee data its Assignee Type needs, so the subtask chain engine never silently resolves a null assignee.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(Assignee_Type__c, "Static User"), ISBLANK(Static_Assignee__c)), AND(ISPICKVAL(Assignee_Type__c, "Dynamic Matter Field"), ISBLANK(Dynamic_Assignee_Field__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When Assignee Type is "Static User", Static Assignee is required. When Assignee Type is "Dynamic Matter Field", Dynamic Assignee Field is required.
